how to make lasagna like an Italian Nonna 🤭🍝🧀   THE SAUCE (cook 3 hours, no shortcuts) blend 2 onions, 3 carrots & celery fry in oil. brown 500g pork + 500g beef mince with basil, rosemary & bay leaves. add crushed tomato & simmer 3 hrs 🍅 THE LAYERS (x5) soften lasagne sheets in oil & water. sauce → Parmigiano Reggiano (go to an Italian deli!!!) → mozzarella → lasagne sheet → repeat. bake until golden!!  enjoy (Nonna also has a vege version which i LOVE!)  #italian #italianfood #nonna #lasagna #pasta

Are you paying attention to CBDCs yet? 🔒 Central bank digital currencies are not just “digital money.” They raise bigger questions about financial tracking, programmable spending, and how much control gets built into everyday payments. That is why privacy habits matter now. The Zero Trace Pen helps you add a privacy-first layer with Tor-protected tools, more separation from your daily computer, and a calmer way to manage sensitive activity. Not invisible. Just more intentional. #Privacy #DigitalPrivacy #DataSecurity #OnlineSafety #PrivacyTools #CyberHygiene
